//: Dev-only seed for `bun run dev`. Copy this file to config.init.json (gitignored) and fill in your own values. On a fresh .dev/data the daemon seeds a model provider + profile + credential + default agent from this file so you skip the /init wizard. Leave apiKey/model blank to fall back to OPENROUTER_API_KEY / OPENROUTER_MODEL from .env.local. Leave telegram.botToken blank (or drop the telegram block) to skip the dev Telegram channel. Nothing here is read in production.
